hero.title: Private houses shaped by forest air, warm light, and quiet comfort.
hero.subtitle: Aygoot brings together a small collection of premium houses and cabins in Dilijan, designed for calm getaways, romantic weekends, and elegant family stays.

featured.title: A focused collection, not a crowded marketplace.
featured.subtitle: Each home is selected for atmosphere, privacy, quality, and a sense of place.

story.title: Woodland calm with the comfort of a premium retreat.
story.body: Dilijan offers cooler air, pine forests, mountain silence, and a slower rhythm. Aygoot pairs that natural setting with a more polished, trustworthy booking experience.

experience.title: Built to feel premium before, during, and after booking.
items: Mobile-first booking requests with quick clarity on status
Curated private homes instead of generic listing overload
Warm visual design inspired by wood, stone, and mountain light

trust.title: Simple for guests, powerful for careful hosting.

items.title: Availability is reviewed carefully
items.description: Aygoot starts with a request-first flow so every stay is checked before confirmation.

items.title: Guest or account booking
items.description: Book as a guest or keep your stay history in a personal account.

items.title: Thoughtful communication
items.description: Booking updates are sent clearly by email so guests always know the next step.

cta.title: Find a quieter base in Dilijan.
cta.description: Browse the current collection and send a stay request in a few steps.
